title: Trump pursues Iranian decapitation without a plan for what comes next
summary_full: The U.S. has a fraught track record of toppling autocratic regimes and securing peaceful democracies — even when it has vision for the day after.
summary_public: The U.S. has a fraught track record of toppling autocratic regimes and securing peaceful democracies — even when it has vision for the day after.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump pursues Iranian decapitation without a plan
